mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NM AS userNm, U.USER_CD AS userCd, U.PASSWORD AS password, U.PASSWORD AS passwordOrg, U.TELEPHONE AS telephone, U.EMAIL AS email, U.APPROWAITCNT AS approwaitcnt, C.DETAIL_NM AS stateNm, U.USE_YN AS useYn, U.PICTURE AS picture, U.LOGIN_DATE AS loginDate, U.BRC AS brc, U.BRNM AS brnm, U.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, U.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, G.USER_GRP_ID AS userGrpId, (SELECT USER_GRP_NM FROM MHDB.TB_USER_GROUP WHERE USER_GRP_ID = G.USER_GRP_ID) AS userGrpNm FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO U LEFT OUTER JOIN MHDB.TB_CODE_DETAIL C ON 'STATE_CD' = C.GROUP_CD AND C.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN MHDB.TB_USER_MEMBER G ON G.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USE_YN != 'D'
AND (U.USER_NM ILIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%' OR U.USER_CD ILIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%')
ORDER BY U.EXPIRE_DATE DESC, U.BRNM, U.USER_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_USER_INFO (USER_CD, USER_NM, PASSWORD, EXPIRE_DATE, TELEPHONE, EMAIL, APPROWAITCNT, USE_YN, PICTURE, BRC, BRNM, IP_ADDRESS) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{userNm}, #{password}, #{expireDate}, #{telephone}, #{email}, 0, #{useYn}, #{picture}, #{brc}, #{brnm}, #{ipAddress})
